data.title: Photographer Dang Van Phuoc, 90, known for his bravery in Vietnam War, dies. Lost eye in grenade incident.
data.description: A photojournalist who worked for The Associated Press dedicated ten years covering combat in Vietnam and was wounded, losing his right eye in a grenade blast.
Tom Lee's BitMine Stock At Risk As Ethereum ETF Outflows Jump, Network Stats Fall

data.title: Cyient Enters Agreement to Acquire TAO Digital
data.description: Cyient Limited, a global Intelligent Engineering solutions company based in Hyderabad, India, has recently acquired a company to enhance its portfolio by incorporating AI-native data and lifecycle engineering capabilities. This strategic move aims to drive data readiness and digital transformation for Cyient's customers. The acquisition, announced on May 30, 2026, is set to significantly boost Cyient's offerings, positioning the company as a leader in leveraging advanced technologies. This acquisition sets Cyient on a path to capitalize on emerging trends, with a focus on improving data processing and enhancing digital solutions for its clients.

data.title: Whitehawk Therapeutics Presents Real‑World Analysis Confirming SEZ6 as a Highly Expressed, Clinically Relevant Target for SCLC and Other Neuroendocrine Tumors at ASCO 2026
data.description: SEZ6 expression levels in Small Cell Lung Cancer surpass those of both established and upcoming Antibody-Drug Conjugate (ADC) targets. There is a notable correlation between SEZ6 and DLL3 expression in neuroendocrine carcinomas, suggesting the feasibility of a combined approach. These results back Whitehawk's progress in creating HWK-206, a SEZ6-targeting ADC, as a promising option.

data.title: Precigen Presents New Long-Term Durability Data for PAPZIMEOS, Recently Granted Seven-Year Market Exclusivity, Demonstrating Complete Responses Beyond 4 Years
data.description: A total of 18 individuals underwent treatment for RRP, with 15 achieving complete response, indicating an 83% success rate. Notably, 5 of these complete responders have maintained their response for over 4 years. The median duration of these complete responses has not been determined yet, as follow-up is still in progress.

data.title: Ducks Unlimited Completes Historic $4.06 Billion Campaign
data.description: A significant conservation initiative by DU has exceeded its targets, making it the organization's most ambitious campaign to date. The campaign has made a generational impact on North America's wetlands and waterfowl. The achievement was announced by Ducks Unlimited, Inc. (DU) in Memphis, Tenn., on May 30, 2026. The campaign has surpassed its goals, benefitting wetlands and waterfowl conservation in North America. This milestone marks a significant moment for DU's conservation efforts, with profound implications for the region.
XRP Price Shows Some Bottoming Signs As ETFs Clocks Best Month Of 2026

data.title: HYPE Price Targets $100 Jump As Hyperliquid ETF Inflows And Perps Volume Jumps
data.description: Hyperliquid's HYPE token experienced a significant surge on Saturday, following a trend that began in January when it hit a low of $20. It reached an all-time high of $67, with indicators pointing towards a potential rise to $100. The token has been forming a bullish cup & handle pattern since September of the previous year, starting with a high of $59.45. After a gradual recovery, it reached a low of $20 and has since completed the second half of the cup formation. A breakout occurred in May after the formation of a handle, with a price depth of $40. Analysts suggest a target price of $100 based on this pattern. Hyperliquid has emerged as a key player in the DeFi sector, solidifying its position as a significant protocol within the industry.
Orion Pharma reveals Phase 1/2 TEADES trial results of TEAD inhibitor ODM-212 in advanced solid tumor patients.

data.title: Eikon Therapeutics Presents Data on Clinical-Stage Programs at the 2026 Annual Meeting of the American Society of Clinical Oncology
data.description: Eikon Therapeutics, based in Millbrae, California, disclosed significant updates at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting in Chicago. The biopharmaceutical company, listed as (Nasdaq: EIKN), shared insight into its EIK1001 trial for non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) and its PARP1 inhibitor EIK1003. These presentations highlighted data from their lead programs, focusing on developing groundbreaking medicines for critical unmet medical needs. The company's involvement in late-stage clinical trials signifies a promising advancement in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Global Data for BioNTech and Bristol Myers Squibb’s PD-L1xVEGF-A Bispecific Pumitamig Shows Encouraging Efficacy in Patients with Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer in ROSETTA Lung-02 Trial
data.description: A promising development has been reported in the medical field as BioNTech and BMS' PD-L1xVEGF-A bispecific pumitamig demonstrated positive efficacy in individuals suffering from non-small cell lung cancer during the ROSETTA Lung-02 trial. This innovative treatment has shown encouraging results, marking a significant advancement in the fight against this prevalent form of cancer. The combination therapy exhibited promising outcomes for patients, with a notable increase in overall survival rates and improved quality of life. The successful trial results provide hope for individuals battling non-small cell lung cancer, offering a potential new treatment option that could significantly impact patient outcomes and prognosis.

data.title: Anthony Scaramucci Heard Hal Finney & Winklevoss Twins, Yet Couldn't 'Care Less' About Bitcoin—Until A White House Moment Changed Everything
data.description: Anthony Scaramucci, founder of SkyBridge Capital, has become a strong advocate for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) despite initially struggling to grasp its significance. Introduced to Bitcoin in 2011 by Hal Finney, a pioneer in the field who received the first BTC transaction from Satoshi Nakamoto, Scaramucci admitted that he didn't understand it at the time. This skepticism persisted until 2013 when, on Twitter, he expressed ignorance about Bitcoin and a lack of interest. Scaramucci's perspective changed when he was reintroduced to Bitcoin by the Winklevoss twins at a Las Vegas conference. Despite initial doubts, their explanation sparked his interest in the leading cryptocurrency. This transition in Scaramucci's views highlights the evolving perception of Bitcoin among influential figures.
Bitcoin ETFs Just Had The Worst Month Of The Year: Are Investors Rotating to Stocks?

data.title: BW LPG Enters Into Agreement for Eight 90’cbm Panamax Newbuildings with Hyundai Heavy Industries
data.description: BW LPG Limited, a prominent company in the LPG vessel industry, has recently finalized a deal to construct eight Panamax Very Large Gas Carriers (VLGCs). The contract amounts to roughly US$940 million, pending final technical details. These vessels, each with a capacity of 90'cbm, are scheduled for delivery in phases starting from early 2029 and continuing through the second quarter of 2030. This significant investment underscores BW LPG's commitment to expanding its fleet and strengthening its position in the market.
Charles Hoskinson's Cardano Has Made Just $352,000 In 2026 Despite $8.2 Billion Market Cap

data.title: GOP candidate in Florida's 22nd Congressional District converts $800,000 in Bitcoin to fund campaign.
data.description: A GOP candidate running for Florida's 22nd Congressional District recently sold off Bitcoin to raise funds for his campaign.

data.title: Prostate Health Supplements From PureHealth Research Enhance Bladder Control With Clinical Lycopene
data.description: A company based in Manassas, Virginia, PureHealth Research, is emphasizing the significance of clinical Lycopene and specific botanicals in its specially formulated supplements for prostate support. These supplements, supported by extensive peer-reviewed research spanning decades, combine Saw Palmetto with Lycopene to provide effective results...

data.title: Mineralys Therapeutics Presents New Data from the Phase 3 Launch-HTN Trial of Lorundrostat in Participants with Hypertension and Chronic Kidney Disease at European Meeting on Hypertension and Cardiovascular Protection (ESH 2026)
data.description: A recent post hoc analysis of the pivotal Launch-HTN trial revealed significant and substantial reductions in blood pressure among participants with chronic kidney disease. The study showed statistically significant results, indicating a meaningful impact on participants' health. This analysis provides valuable insights into the effectiveness of the trial, with key emphasis placed on the improvement of blood pressure levels in individuals with chronic kidney disease.

data.title: Local Action to Protect Our Youth from Nicotine Addiction
data.description: The National League of Cities and Healthy Americas Foundation have jointly released a call to action urging cities to take steps to safeguard youth from flavored tobacco products. As World No Tobacco Day approaches on May 31st, the organizations recommend four key actions for cities to implement. In light of the prevalence of flavored nicotine products, this initiative aims to address the urgent need for protection of youth from such items. By May 30, 2026, the nationwide efforts to combat the influence of flavored tobacco are set to gain momentum.

data.title: Massive Bio Announces Next-Generation Reticulum Nexus™ Product Suite at ASCO 2026
data.description: Chicago-based company Massive Bio has unveiled their latest product suite, Reticulum Nexus™, providing a comprehensive system of AI tools and resources for oncology access. This includes Patient Connect™, TrialRelay™, NexusPulse™, Sentinel Agents™, DrArturo AI™, and Phoebe AI. The suite aims to streamline oncology processes by shifting from disjointed trial matching to a more cohesive approach. These next-generation products offer advanced features such as AI agents, intelligent calculators, signal engines, patient navigation tools, and physician referral workflows. This move represents a significant stride towards enhancing efficiency and coordination in the oncology field.
